title: Mystic Magics
description: Mystic Magics enhances many Vanilla enchantments.
body:
The max level of many enchantments is larger than Vanilla

<details>
<summary>Enchantments</summary>

```
Enchantment -> max level
```


- Aqua Affinity -> 5
- Bane of Arthropods -> 10
- Density -> 10
- Efficiency -> 10
- Fortune -> 5
- Impaling -> 10
- Knockback -> 255
- Luck of the Sea -> 5
- Lure -> 5
- Mending -> 5
- Power -> 10
- Punch -> 255
- Respiration -> 5
- Sharpness -> 10
- Smite -> 10
- Unbreaking -> 10

</details>

Mobs can spawn with better enchanted equipment.
